title: Cover bootstrap-mode copy-forward behavior
summary: Adds reusable-core regression coverage for copied-core repos with valid local packs, stale donor registry metadata, and incomplete local workspace rewiring.
scope_items: Create fixture-backed tests that simulate copied donor core plus a first-party or nested local pack without relying on manual Oversight repo edits.
Prove structured failure handling for stale authored registry entries and successful manifest-driven discovery of valid local packs.
done_when_items: Regression coverage proves the donor-core hardening slice instead of relying on ad hoc external verification.
Current plan-pack tests remain green after the copy-forward cases are added.
